properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3 v6 v3 v7 v3 v8 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We walk by faith and not by sight Our eyes look to the unseen The Lord Jesus Christ For He has promised That we will reign with Him

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But the pathway to glory is through suffering So count it all joy when you fall in divers temptations For it’s only to bring you to that perfect place

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Though we are tested and we are tried Yet in the midst of it all We can have peace of mind For the trying of our faith worketh patience For in my lowest valley He restoreth my soul He gives me strength to keep pressing on

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Sometimes we pray, "Oh Lord, please take our lives. We just can’t go on, and we don’t know what to do." But in that hour we find a Juniper tree

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Where the Angel comes To strengthen for the journey ahead For in our weakness, His strength is made perfect And His grace is sufficient for us. (I'm pressing on)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Though we are tested (I'm pressing on) and we are tried (The upward way) Yet in the midst of it all (New heights I'm gaining) We can have peace of mind (Everyday)

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: For the trying of our faith worketh patience For in my lowest valley He restoreth my soul He gives me strength to keep pressing on

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: He gives me strength (when I'm down in the valley) He gives me strength (in the midst of my trials) He gives me strength (so I'm pressing on) He gives me strength to keep pressing on
